CREATE TABLE temp_keys (id INT, key_data VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO temp_keys (id, key_data, created_at) VALUES (1, 'temp_key_1', NOW()), (2, 'temp_key_2', NOW()), (3, 'temp_key_3', NOW());
SELECT id, key_data FROM temp_keys WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour';
SELECT xenc_delete_temp_keys() FROM (SELECT * FROM temp_keys) AS t;
SELECT xenc_delete_temp_keys() WHERE EXTI EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM temp_keys WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes');
CREATE TABLE users (user_id INT, user_name VARCHAR(100));
SELECT u.user_name, k.key_data FROM users u JOIN temp_keys k ON u.user_id = k.id WHERE u.user_id = 1;
